atDirectives.name: @tailwind
atDirectives.description: Include Tailwind's base, components, utilities, or screens styles.

atDirectives.name: @apply
atDirectives.description: Apply utility classes as CSS declarations.

atDirectives.name: @layer
atDirectives.description: Define styles belonging to base, components, or utilities layers.

atDirectives.name: @screen
atDirectives.description: Conditionally apply styles based on breakpoints.

atDirectives.name: @responsive
atDirectives.description: Generate responsive variants of custom CSS.

atDirectives.name: @variants
atDirectives.description: Generate pseudo-class variants of custom CSS.
